name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-generated presentations that actually look like a human made them.
problem: Most AI presentation tools produce generic, template-heavy slides that feel robotic and require heavy manual cleanup. Chronicle 2.0 addresses the gap between AI speed and design quality, letting teams produce polished, on-brand decks without sacrificing aesthetic control. It removes the tedious back-and-forth between AI output and professional-looking results.
useCases: Creating investor pitch decks that look custom-designed without hiring a designer
Building sales proposals quickly while maintaining brand consistency
Producing internal strategy presentations with minimal formatting effort
Turning written reports or briefs into structured slide decks automatically
